project_info.name: Mahaveer Brothers Trading And Service Company
project_info.vibe: Clean, Professional, Trustworthy, Modern, Fast, Premium yet Accessible
project_info.tagline: BEST LAUNDRY AND DRYCLEANING SERVICE WITH FREE PICKUP AND DROP

theme.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified with brand colors (Red/Gold/Black on White)

scales.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-text_main

components.hero: High-contrast layout. Large 'Outfit' typography. Prominent WhatsApp Green CTA button. Image should have a slight vignette or clean crop so text pops. Avoid generic centered layouts; use an asymmetrical 60/40 split.
components.buttons: Rounded-full for main CTAs (approachable). High contrast text. Primary booking buttons should be WhatsApp green. Secondary buttons black or red. Include hover translation (e.g. -translate-y-1) and drop shadow.
components.services_grid: Bento Grid approach (Tetris grid). Mix of tall and wide cards. Cardless style with subtle 1px border or off-white background (#F9FAFB). Use Lucide icons sized generously.
components.booking_form: Shadcn UI based but customized. Clean white card with 1px border, inputs should have clear focus states (ring-primary). Button is full width WhatsApp Green.
components.how_it_works: Horizontal or zig-zag step flow. Use the Gold/Orange accent for numbering (e.g., 01, 02) in large display font.
components.admin_dashboard: Clean, dense sidebar layout. Use Shadcn Tables for managing booking statuses (Pending, Picked-Up, In-Progress, Delivered). Keep the dashboard utilitarian (black/white/gray).
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-right, z-50, shadow-2xl, pulse animation to draw attention.

icons.style: Clean, line-based, 2px stroke. Colored with primary red or secondary gold.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case format based on role (e.g., `data-testid="hero-whatsapp-booking-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout to ensure bento grids and spacing aren't restricted by standard component constraints.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for forms (Booking Form, Admin Login) and the Admin Dashboard (Tables, Dialogs, Selects).
WhatsApp integration is CRITICAL. The booking form must trigger a backend POST and simultaneously redirect the user to WhatsApp with a prefilled message containing their booking details.
The Floating WhatsApp button must be visible at all times.
Typography: Use `Outfit` for all headings and `Work Sans` for body text. Enforce this via Tailwind classes or base CSS.
Admin dashboard should be protected and reside under /admin.
Ensure the hero section highlights the free pickup and drop off prominently.
